report.summary: Standup v8 ~18:09 CET — all 6 agents ran since v7 (17:06); /learn/defai-guide-2026 published (deploy FMyNdXNVn, 287 pages); build-run9 scaffolded MegaETH + Abstract Chain (QUEUE now 2); design-v7 polished DeFAI UX + OG image; community-v10 staged Ethereum Pectra 7-thread + Tax Guide + 270-pages milestone; EOD-v5 confirmed production stable at 289 pages; build 1b4a15e still broken (1-line apostrophe fix pending).

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Standup v7 (~17:06 CET)
items: 📄 PUBLISHED: publish-v5 (17:19) promoted /learn/defai-guide-2026 → PUBLISHED_PAGES. Deploy FMyNdXNVn triggered from d3bce36. All QA checks passed (page.tsx ✅, H1 ✅, breadcrumbs ✅, metadata ✅, OG ✅, JSON-LD ✅, 0 TS errors on page). Total published count per publish-v5: 287.

🏗️ Build run-9 (17:28): Scaffolded /learn/megaeth-guide (MegaETH — real-time L2, 100K TPS, launched Feb 2026) + /learn/abstract-chain-guide (Abstract Chain — consumer crypto ZK rollup by Pudgy Penguins). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. QUEUE depth: 2.

🎨 Design-v7 (17:34): UX improvements to DeFAIProtocolExplorer — clear-filters button, inline search clear (✕), fadeInDown expand animation (0.15s, prefers-reduced-motion respected), improved empty state with icon + CTA. OG image created: og-defai-guide.svg (1200×630, purple→blue gradient, 3 stat cards, Perceive/Reason/Act loop illustration, 6 protocol pills). Carry-forward: inline styles → Tailwind migration, SVG→PNG conversion for OG.

📣 Community-v10 (17:49): NET-NEW pages /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide (90/100 score, ~25-day countdown to mainnet, EIP-7702 smart accounts) + /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 (89/100 score, April 15 US deadline 31 days). 7-post Pectra Twitter thread drafted (EIP-7702/7251/7691 angles). DCA Calculator BTC volatility tweet. 270-pages milestone social card. April 15 tax countdown tweet. Discord/Telegram announcements. Thursday newsletter: Pectra lead + Tax Guide + Sprint 58 live-data teaser. 2 SVG social cards: social-270-pages-milestone.svg, social-dca-calculator.svg. Schedule: Sun milestone+Discord → Mon DCA tweet+teaser → Tue Pectra thread → Wed Tax tweet → Thu newsletter → Fri poll.

📊 EOD-v5 (17:55): Production stable at 289 pages (+2 vs EOD-v4's 287). QUEUE holds 2 guides: /learn/megaeth-guide + /learn/abstract-chain-guide. Build 1b4a15e root cause confirmed: unescaped apostrophe at AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 (`you're` → needs escape). Vercel Pro trial: 8 days remaining.

🔍 GSC Day 16: Site is inside the critical 14–21 day indexing window. First organic impressions/clicks could arrive today. No confirmed GSC data yet — all metrics remain projection-based. Highest urgency: rate limiting (0/6 routes) and fallback data (1/6 routes) before organic spike hits.

sections.title: Project Manager — Cycle Delta vs Carry-Overs
items: PUBLISHED ✅ /learn/defai-guide-2026 — DeFAI guide (AI agents in DeFi, $18B+ sector). 3,200w + DeFAIProtocolExplorer interactive component (8 protocols, search/filter/sort, ARIA). Live via FMyNdXNVn.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/megaeth-guide — MegaETH real-time L2 guide (100K TPS, Feb 2026 launch). QA-ready for next publish cycle.
QUEUED 📋 /learn/abstract-chain-guide — Abstract Chain consumer ZK rollup guide (Pudgy Penguins ecosystem). QA-ready for next publish cycle.

OPEN 🔴 Build error 1b4a15e — root cause CONFIRMED: unescaped apostrophe in AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 (`reason: 'Your Uniswap activity shows you're ready...'`). Single-character fix unblocks Sprint 59 ecosystem + courses (176 dApps, courses hub). Now 7h+. No programmer cycle ran to fix it post-root-cause.
OPEN 🔴 Rate limiting — 0/6 API routes wired. checkRateLimit built but unwired since Sprint 38. GSC Day 16 = live organic risk.
OPEN 🔴 Vercel Pro trial — 8 days remaining. Payment action required.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Fallback data: 1/6 routes (market-dominance only). prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, defi-yields unprotected on cold cache failure.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100/289 published slugs missing page.tsx — triage audit needed.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 TS errors: 57 across 2 files — AICourseRecommendations.tsx (17 from line 96 apostrophe) + structured-data.examples.ts (40, pre-existing). Non-blocking but growing risk.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 market-metrics TTL mismatch: upstream revalidate=120s but Cache-Control s-maxage=60s — minor inconsistency, no user impact.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 WalletConnect Project ID — wallet auth, gamification, referral tracking all gated.
BLOCKED [Jefe] 🟡 GitHub Actions secrets — Playwright CI blocked.
SPRINT 58 STATUS: 0% — DeFiLlama Live API (Screener V3), Email Drip via Resend, Referral Backend, not started. Bloomberg Screener V3 still on mock data Day 16.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Fix AICourseRecommendations.tsx line 96 NOW. The apostrophe in `you're` terminates the single-quoted string. This is a 1-character fix that has been sitting identified-but-unpatched for multiple cycles. Every cycle without this fix means Sprint 59's ecosystem/courses routes (176 dApps, courses hub) stay off production. Assign Programmer as first action next build cycle. This is not a complex task — do not defer further.

PRIORITY 2 — Publish MegaETH + Abstract Chain from QUEUE, then wire rate limiting across 6 routes. Both guides are QA-ready. Publish them before next build cycle adds more backlog. Then immediately wire checkRateLimit: GSC Day 16 means organic crawlers and users may start hitting the site today. A bot hitting the CoinGecko-backed API routes without limiting is a live threat. Simultaneously add FALLBACK_DATA to the 5 unprotected routes (1 line each — market-dominance has the pattern, copy it).

PRIORITY 3 — Sprint 58 DeFiLlama live feed. Bloomberg Screener V3 is the #1 traffic tool on degen0x and it is running mock data on Day 16 of production. When Google evaluators hit it organically, they see mock data. This is the single highest-quality/credibility gap on the platform. Once Priority 1 unblocks the build and Priority 2 secures the API layer, the Sprint 58 DeFiLlama integration converts the flagship tool from 'demo' to 'real product'. This is the move.
